summary: Backend pytest suite (8/8 PASSED, 100%). Frontend smoke + bug verification on Banbansports UNDERGROUND HD confirmed 3 critical user-reported bugs and identified several additional issues. Tested: page load, channel switching, server switching (incl. network capture), scoreboard behavior, match center, league filters, notification toggle, mobile viewport, service worker registration, data-testid coverage, and console errors.

ui_bugs.issue: Scoreboard STUCK on 'MAÇ SONU' (Gençlerbirliği 1-2 Galatasaray). When important Turkish club match is finished AND no live Turkish match exists, app.js (lines 484-488) just keeps displaying the finished match. No fallback to 'tomorrow's most important Turkish match' as user explicitly requested. Logic branch `impFinished && !liveTurkMatch` needs to query /api/livescore/date/{tomorrow} and pick the best Turkish/big-league match; otherwise at minimum iterate through today's upcoming Turkish matches.

CONFIRMED via network capture: clicking Sunucu 3 (EU) triggers m3u8 request to https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/img_bipbop_adv_example_fmp4/master.m3u8 (Apple bipbop test stream — the 'bip bip bip' tone video). Root cause: app.js line 50 `STREAMS.apple` and line 57-62 `SERVER_ALTERNATIVES` uses STREAMS.apple as the 3rd server for demo1, demo2, trt1, trthaber, trtspor, tv8. Must replace with real EU CDN fallback or at least a working stream (or disable Sunucu 3 when no EU alt exists).

All push/in-app notifications use hardcoded icon 'tsl_logo.png' regardless of event type. app.js lines 683-684 and 694-695 set icon and badge statically. No per-type mapping (goal → ⚽ icon, redcard → 🟥, penalty → icon, kickoff, halftime, fulltime). Request: build a map { goal: 'icons/goal.png', redcard: 'icons/red.png', penalty: 'icons/pen.png', kickoff: 'icons/kick.png', halftime: 'icons/ht.png', fulltime: 'icons/ft.png' } OR use emoji/text-rendered SVG icons per `type` param.

updateScoreboard() always calls sendMatchNotification(match, status) (app.js line 570). If scoreboard falls back to `bigLeagueMatch` (Premier League / Serie A etc. without any Turkish team), users with notifications ON can still get alerts for a foreign match. sendMatchNotification should hard-check isTurkish(match.team1) || isTurkish(match.team2) before dispatching. checkMatchEvents() is correctly gated but the separate scoreboard notification path is not.

At 390px viewport, team names get visually clipped at left/right edges (e.g. 'GENÇLERBIRLİĞI' renders as 'ENÇLERBIRLİĞI' and 'GALATASARAY' as 'GALATASARA'). Need responsive font-size clamp or ellipsis/abbreviation for long team names on mobile.

Clicking BİLDİRİM button had no observable UI change in test (stayed 'KAPALI'). In headless env permission was likely auto-denied, but UI should then show 'REDDEDİLDİ' / error hint rather than silent 'KAPALI'. Consider adding user-visible feedback when Notification.permission === 'denied'.
One static resource returns 404 on initial page load (console log). Could not pinpoint exact URL from captured log — main agent should check /var/log/supervisor/frontend.*.log or DevTools network.

integration_issues.issue: No call to /api/livescore/date/{YYYYMMDD} for tomorrow's fixtures when today has only finished Turkish matches. Endpoint exists on backend (verified passing) but frontend fetchLiveScore only hits /api/livescore/today.
Server 3 swap immediately loads a test-pattern stream with continuous audio tones which would annoy users live.

issues: Long Turkish team names clip off left/right edges

passed_tests: Page loads (title: 'banbansports UNDERGROUND HD | SÜPER LİG'), no JS pageerror
All data-testid attributes present (58+ testids enumerated: header, logo, status-badge, notif-toggle, channel-*, match-banner, video-player, server-0..5, matches-grid, etc.)
15 channel tabs render: DEMO 1/2/3, REKLAM, TRT 1, TRT HABER, TV 8, TRT SPOR, beIN 1/2, S SPORT, GS TV, FB TV, ATV, A SPOR
REKLAM channel shows rotating game ad overlay (Destiny 2 captured)
Match Center renders 41 match cards with 10 league filter buttons (TÜMÜ, SÜPER LİG, 1. LİG, 2. LİG, ŞAMPİYONLAR LİGİ, SERIE A, BUNDESLIGA, LA LIGA, PREMIER LİG, LIGUE 1)
Scoreboard reads real LiveScore data (Gençlerbirliği vs Galatasaray — Süper Lig)
Backend: GET /api/scores/live returns {type, team1, team2, score1, score2, league, status}
Backend: GET /api/channels returns all 14 channel entries
Backend: GET /api/bein/master.m3u8 builds custom HLS manifest correctly
6 server selector buttons visible (Sunucu 1 TR / 2 Yedek / 3 EU / 4 / 5 / 6)
action_items: FIX scoreboard stuck on MAÇ SONU: when the important Turkish club match is FT and no liveTurkMatch exists, fetch /api/livescore/date/{tomorrow_yyyymmdd} and pick best upcoming Turkish (or Süper Lig) match. Add 30-60s auto-refresh.

FIX Sunucu 3 (EU) Apple bipbop stream: remove STREAMS.apple fallback from SERVER_ALTERNATIVES in app.js L56-64. Replace with a real EU mirror or hide Sunucu 3 when no alt exists. STREAMS.apple constant should also be removed entirely to prevent regressions.

FIX push-notification icons: map `type` (goal/redcard/penalty/kickoff/halftime/fulltime/kickoff_soon) → dedicated icon asset. Update both sendNotification paths (L681-689 SW and L692-703 direct Notification).
FIX foreign-match notification leak: in updateScoreboard/sendMatchNotification, guard with `isTurkishTeam(match.team1)||isTurkishTeam(match.team2)` before dispatching browser/push notification.
Mobile scoreboard: add responsive font-size / ellipsis for long team names <=390px viewport.
BİLDİRİM button: surface explicit feedback when Notification.permission === 'denied'.
Investigate single 404 resource request on load (likely asset missing).
critical_code_review_comments: app.js is 1616 lines — violates file-size guideline (>700). Split into modules: video/hls, scoreboard, notifications, matchCenter, serverSelector, adRotation.

SERVER_ALTERNATIVES map uses the same primary URL twice + apple test stream (e.g. `[STREAMS.trt1, STREAMS.trt1, STREAMS.apple]`). Fallbacks should point to genuinely different backups, not duplicates.
sendNotification and sendMatchAlert have overlapping responsibilities — consolidate.
Scoreboard match-selection logic (416-522) has deeply nested branches and mutates 6 module-level variables; candidate for state-machine refactor.
fetchLiveScore falls through to /api/scores/live (backend Türkiye-Romanya fallback) but never rechecks tomorrow's matches — add tomorrow-lookup branch.
TURKISH_TEAMS list in backend (server.py) and turkTeams list in app.js are duplicated and slightly divergent — consolidate to a single source served from backend.
WebSocket /api/ws/scores exists but pytest suite skipped WS test (needs websockets client). Suggest adding ws smoke-test in next iteration.
checkMatchEvents iterates evts twice (once for live events, once for FT) — can be unified.
Goal-scorer detection `s1 > (totalGoals - s2 - (totalGoals - prev.goals)) ? t1 : t2` (L271) is mathematically obscure/incorrect; should compare (s1 - prev.s1) vs (s2 - prev.s2).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid (8/8 pytest). Focus on verifying frontend fixes: (1) scoreboard rolls to tomorrow's top Turkish match when today done, (2) Sunucu 3 no longer requests devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/.../bipbop..., verify via page.on('request'), (3) notification icons differ by type — inspect reg.showNotification call args or in-app alert markup, (4) mobile 390px scoreboard text fits. Use [data-testid='match-minute'], [data-testid='server-2'], [data-testid='notif-toggle']. Backend WS endpoint /api/ws/scores untested.

rca_of_the_issue.scoreboard_stuck: app.js fetchLiveScore L484-488 branch `impFinished && !liveTurkMatch` calls updateScoreboard(importantMatch) unconditionally — no tomorrow fallback, so finished Galatasaray match persists indefinitely.
rca_of_the_issue.sunucu_3_bipbop: SERVER_ALTERNATIVES[channelKey][2] === STREAMS.apple (app.js L57-62). STREAMS.apple = Apple's public bipbop test-pattern HLS (`img_bipbop_adv_example_fmp4/master.m3u8`). Network trace of Sunucu 3 click: 1 m3u8 hit, exactly that URL.
rca_of_the_issue.static_push_icon: sendNotification (L675-703) hard-codes icon:'tsl_logo.png' & badge:'tsl_logo.png' in both SW and fallback Notification branches regardless of `type`.
rca_of_the_issue.foreign_notification_risk: updateScoreboard→sendMatchNotification fires whenever scoreboard updates; when bigLeagueMatch fallback kicks in (no Turkish candidates), users get notified for non-Turkish matches.
